nodes.title: List Stations
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/stations with Authorization header. Returns array of stations with {id, name, businessId}.

nodes.title: Get Station Details
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/stations/:id with Authorization header. Returns single station {id, name, businessId}. Returns 404 if not found.

nodes.title: Create Station
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/stations with {name}. Creates station record. Returns created station with {id, name, businessId}.

nodes.title: Update Station
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/stations/:id with {name}. Updates station name. Returns updated station.

nodes.title: Delete Station
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/stations/:id. Removes station record. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.
